message.content:
@startuml
participant Client
participant TEAPServer

TEAPServer -> Client : EAP-Request/
Identity
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/
Type=Identity
TEAPServer -> Client : EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TEAP Start,
Authority-ID TLV
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ClientHello)

note left
(1)
(2)
end note
TEAPServer -> Client : EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ServerHello,
ServerKeyExchange,
ServerHelloDone)

note left
(3)
end note
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
ClientKeyExchange,
CertificateVerify,
ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished)

TEAPServer -> Client : EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished),
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}
Client -> TEAPServer : EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}
TEAPServer -> Client : EAP-Success
@enduml
